# Top 6 Fin AI Alternatives in 2025

BO

Bildad Oyugi

Head of Content

Intercom’s Fin AI is one of the most talked-about players in this space. It promises instant answers, deep Intercom integration, and a seamless way to deflect repetitive tickets.

But here’s the catch: many scale-ups are finding that Fin doesn’t always live up to the hype. From unpredictable pricing to limited data sources, leaders are starting to explore alternatives that better fit their needs.

That’s where this guide comes in.

The Fin AI alternatives that support teams actually use. Side-by-side features, pricing, and real results from 2026 testing.

fin-ai-alternatives

In this article

Text Link

Intercom's Fin AI is a capable chatbot for answering customer questions.

It handles knowledge-based Q&A, deflects simple tickets, and supports multiple languages out of the box.

But here's where it falls short for ecommerce: Fin can explain what's happening with an order, but it cannot actually fix the problem. [...] Most modern Fin AI alternatives for ecommerce offer no-code setup. Ringly.io deploys in 3 minutes, Tidio installs with one click, and Yuma connects via Shopify app. Enterprise platforms like KODIF and DigitalGenius may require 15-60 days for implementation with professional services.

### Which Fin AI alternative is best for small ecommerce stores with limited budgets?

Tidio is the best budget-friendly Fin AI alternative for ecommerce. It offers a 14-day free trial with 50 conversations and 50 Lyro AI interactions monthly. Paid plans start at $24/month. For phone support specifically, Ringly.io's Grow plan at $349/month covers 1,000 minutes.

‍

HappyDesk alternatives

AI phone agent for Shopify. Handles calls. Brings in orders.

Hear AI handle calls
See how it works [...] Fin AI alternatives for ecommerce range from free (Tidio) to enterprise custom pricing (KODIF, Siena). Transparent options include Ringly.io starting at $349/month, Gorgias at $10/month for helpdesk plus AI fees, and Tidio at $24/month for paid plans. Enterprise solutions like KODIF and DigitalGenius require custom quotes.

### Which Fin AI alternative has the highest automation rate for ecommerce?

KODIF reports the highest automation rates among Fin AI alternatives for ecommerce, reaching 76-92% resolution across ticket types. Siena AI claims up to 80% automation, while Gorgias and Tidio typically achieve 60-67%. Actual rates depend on your ticket complexity and workflow configuration.

results.title: Top finasteride alternatives and how to switch your Rx
results.content:
## Top finasteride alternatives for BPH

### 1. Avodart

Avodart (dutasteride) and Proscar (finasteride) have a lot in common. They are both DHT blockers that reduce DHT levels and shrink the prostate gland. A smaller prostate takes months to achieve, with maximum results occurring six to 12 months into treatment. However, there is a slightly increased risk of sexual dysfunction with these medications. More importantly, they both can suppress prostate-specific antigen (PSA) levels, a blood test used for prostate cancer screening. This might delay a diagnosis and increase the risk of prostate cancer reaching an advanced level before it’s detected.

### 2. Flomax [...] ## Over-the-counter alternatives to finasteride

OTC Rogaine (minoxidil) is an effective treatment for male-pattern and female-pattern hair loss. 

Topical finasteride is an OTC substitute for oral finasteride, but it is not FDA-approved for the treatment of hair loss. In one study, topical finasteride was shown to increase hair density over a period of months without producing significant side effects. Because of safety concerns with absorbing it through the skin, the FDA warns people to talk to a healthcare professional before using these products. [...] Finasteride is a 5-alpha reductase inhibitor (5-ARI) that blocks the enzyme 5-alpha reductase from converting testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a potent androgen hormone. Healthcare providers use low-dose finasteride to treat male pattern baldness (androgenetic alopecia or AGA) and promote hair regrowth. They use high-dose finasteride to relieve the lower urinary tract symptoms (LUTS) of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH). Men may look for an alternative to finasteride because it may not work or it may be hard to live with the side effects, like sexual dysfunction. However, healthcare professionals have limited options for treating either condition.

RELATED: Why is my hair falling out? Learn the causes of hair loss

results.title: Opinion | Alternatives to Finasteride for Hair Loss: A Comprehensive Guide
results.content:
Copy Link

If you don’t want to use finasteride for any reason, there are plenty of alternative treatments you can try.

Here’s the TL;DR on finasteride or Propecia alternatives:

   Finasteride works very well for most men experiencing hair loss, but it’s not for everyone. Women (due to potential risks of birth defects in male babies) and those with non-hormonal hair loss types aren’t good candidates for finasteride. Additionally, people experiencing side effects may be interested in alternatives.

   Each alternative has unique benefits and considerations.For instance, dutasteride shows promise in studies but shares similar side effects with finasteride. Microneedling — while potentially effective when combined with minoxidil — lacks robust standalone evidence. [...] ## FAQs About Finasteride Alternatives

Copy Link

Here are some answers to common questions about finasteride alternatives.

### Are finasteride alternatives as effective?

It depends on the treatment and the person. Some alternatives, like dutasteride or minoxidil, are well-researched and effective, though they may not work exactly the same way as finasteride. Natural options like essential oils or scalp massages tend to be milder and may take longer to show results, if at all.

### How long do natural alternatives take to work?

Most treatments, like minoxidil or saw palmetto, require at least three to six months of consistent use before results become noticeable. They're not quick fixes but may be helpful over time, and they usually work best when combined with other treatments. [...] ## What Can I Use Instead of Finasteride?

Copy Link

If finasteride isn’t for you, don’t sweat it. There are plenty of other ways to fight hair loss, which we’ll break down below. You’ll find details on the efficacy, side effects, and ease of use rankings for each finasteride alternative treatment from Dr. Beasley, who specializes in hair loss.

### Minoxidil

   Pros: FDA-approved, improves blood flow to follicles, widely available

   Cons: Can cause irritation, takes months to see results

   Best for: General thinning and early stages of hair loss

Remember how we said finasteride was one of two FDA-approved medications for hair loss? We know you’ve been on the edge of your seat waiting to find out what the other one is. Enter: minoxidil.

results.title: Is there a safer alternative to finasteride for hair loss? | Ubie Doctor's Note
results.content:
Not seeing your question? No worries.

## Explanation

When considering alternatives to oral finasteride for hair loss, topical treatments are gaining attention. Topical dutasteride is one option that is being explored. It is applied directly to the scalp, which may help reduce side effects compared to taking it by mouth. This method is still being studied, but it looks promising for treating hair loss.

Another option is topical finasteride. Research shows that applying finasteride directly to the scalp can also help with hair loss and might have fewer side effects than taking it orally. This is because less of the medicine gets into the bloodstream when applied to the skin. [...] Doctors Note Logo

# Is there a safer alternative to finasteride for hair loss?

Yoshinori Abe

Reviewed by Yoshinori Abe, MD

Internal Medicine

Topical treatments like topical dutasteride and topical finasteride may offer safer alternatives to oral finasteride for hair loss, with potentially fewer side effects.
